item.text:
Implemented the scaffold for this node: a minimal Vite/React/TypeScript frontend shell, a compiling Tauri Rust shell, fixed shared computation contracts, and versioned persistence schemas. The main boundaries are now defined in [src/core/contracts/index.ts](/C:/Users/alber/OneDrive/문서/GitHub/calculator/src/core/contracts/index.ts), with the required contract docstring preserved there, and the versioned settings/workspace documents live in [src/persistence/schema.ts](/C:/Users/alber/OneDrive/문서/GitHub/calculator/src/persistence/schema.ts).
